description_long: This object is a polygonal, red beverage can with a stylized, blocky white label on its front that reads 'Coke' in a pixelated font. The can has a faceted, cylindrical body with a slightly tapered bottom and a flat, dark gray top featuring a simplified pull-tab opening. The surface is predominantly red, with the label occupying a central position on one side, while the rest of the can remains unadorned. The top of the can is rendered in a darker shade, simulating the metallic lid and pull-tab mechanism. The can's overall appearance is minimalistic, with no visible nutritional labeling, flavor cues, or promotional graphics. Its design is reminiscent of classic soda cans commonly found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, and vending machines.
description: A red, faceted soda can with a pixelated white 'Coke' label and a dark gray pull-tab top. The design is minimalistic and iconic, resembling a classic soft drink can.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pixelated 'Coke' label prominently on the red can body.
description_view_1: Side view with the edge of the label visible, mostly showing the plain red surface and part of the dark top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the plain red surface and the dark gray top, with no label or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a partial, pixelated label visible on the right edge, mostly red surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A pixelated white 'Coke' label is visible on the front of the can, composed of blocky, stylized letters. The logo is centrally located and contrasts with the red background.
